text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Transitional Housing/Shelter * Crime Victims 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth nsitional Housing/Shelter AIDS/HIV Crime Victims Disabilities Issues Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HELPING HANDS AGAINST VIOLENCE HHAV TRANSITIONAL HOUSING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides year-long transitional housing with medical and legal advocacy, including accompaniment to medical, legal, and court appointments; assistance filling out medical and legal forms; transportation, food, clothing, peer counseling, and peer support. PO Box 441 Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Survivors and their children who are victims of sexual assault, domestic violence, or stalking Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 386-6603 247 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HELPING HANDS AGAINST VIOLENCE HHAV TRANSITIONAL HOUSING PROGRAM
